text.title: vui-iot-integration Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the vui-iot-integration methodology end-to-end.

step.name: group-and-scenes
step.action: Group into rooms/zones; define scenes (movie night, away, sleep) with intuitive names.

step.name: feedback-design
step.action: For each multi-device routine, define per-device feedback for partial failures. Reject silent-success aggregation.

step.name: undo-support
step.action: Persist last-command state; expose 'undo' voice intent.

step.name: noise-test
step.action: Build noise-test plan; run kitchen + TV + multi-speaker. Report accuracy per condition.
